meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Slow Development Speed
content.seo_description: Master a high-velocity client workflow to eliminate slow development speed. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to ship enterprise-grade SaaS faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development speed, transition from manual coding to an AI-augmented architectural workflow. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based implementation, you can reduce boilerplate by 80%, allowing you to focus exclusively on high-value business logic and complex client-specific feature requirements.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your IDE is cluttered with repetitive boilerplate. You’re not just fighting bugs; you’re fighting the inertia of legacy workflows that turn 4-hour tasks into 2-day marathons. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-earning AI architect isn't just coding speed—it's the ability to automate the mundane.

We’ve engineered a high-velocity workflow that treats your codebase as an assembly line. By leveraging the synthesis of Antigravity’s structural precision and Claude Code’s command-line intelligence, you can compress your development cycle, shipping production-ready features before the competition even finishes their requirements gathering.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation. Use Antigravity to generate clean, modular architecture that enforces strict separation of concerns, preventing technical debt from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready SaaS project structure using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Implement a modular architecture with custom hooks and service-layer patterns for clean state management.

steps.title: Context-Aware Feature Injection
steps.description: Bridge the gap between requirements and code. Use Claude Code to parse your project's context and implement complex business logic directly into your scaffolded modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing service-layer pattern. Create a new user-authentication module that integrates with Supabase Auth, including error handling and custom email templates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement authentication service with error handling'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suites
steps.description: Shift testing left. Generate comprehensive unit and integration tests immediately upon feature completion to ensure stability without manual overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Playwright integration tests for the authentication flow, covering successful login, invalid credentials, and password reset edge cases.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create playwright tests for auth flow'

steps.title: Refactoring for Performance
steps.description: Optimize your codebase systematically. Leverage AI to identify bottleneck patterns and apply performance-enhancing refactors across the entire project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for performance bottlenecks. Refactor memory-intensive loops into optimized async streams and apply memoization to heavy components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit and optimize project performance'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Automation
steps.description: Close the feedback loop. Streamline the transition from local development to production through automated CI/CD configuration generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel-compatible GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, testing, and deployment on every merge to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate ci/cd pipeline for vercel'

pro_tips: Always define a 'source of truth' schema in a JSON/YAML file before triggering Antigravity to ensure the AI maintains architectural consistency.
Use Claude Code's '--no-stream' flag when working on massive refactors to prevent terminal noise and focus on the diff logs.
Inject your client's brand style guide into your Antigravity prompt to ensure generated components match design specs immediately.
Run periodic 'architectural snapshots' where you ask the AI to summarize the current project state to avoid context drift in long-running projects.
Treat your CLI commands as documentation; keep a 'commands.md' file in your root to track the exact prompts that successfully built your core features.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, perform a full audit of your current client project to identify which modules can be refactored using this method. Begin by migrating your core authentication or data-fetching logic to the new scaffolded structure.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start building at the speed of thought. By mastering this AI-driven workflow, you reclaim your time and deliver premium value to every client. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
